creator: oly@world.std.com
text:
This is an alpha release of WindowMaker, a wm by
        Alfredo Kojima (of the afterstep folks).  There are
        some bugs in the install target of WindowMaker's
        documentation, but other than that it is fairly 
        solid.

Fix: 

Port submitted as WindowMaker-0.6.0-port.tgz

        Many thanks to the FreeBSD team for such a nice OS.
        Sorry I've been out of the porting loop for so long.
        I'll check up on my existing ports next.
        -Oly
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
